description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a steeply pitched, moss-covered gable roof and prominent wooden beams. The structure features a two-story central section with a chimney and a lantern-style light fixture hanging above the main entrance. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs with decorative corner notching, and the roof is partially covered with green moss or turf, giving it an earthy, natural appearance. Windows are arranged in symmetrical clusters, with large, multi-pane windows on the lower level and a single window on the upper gable. A small covered porch with wooden steps and posts extends from the front, while a wooden ladder and some loose planks are visible on the side. The overall design evokes a traditional log cabin style, blending seamlessly with natural surroundings.
description: A rustic log cabin with a mossy gable roof, decorative log corners, and a small front porch. Features symmetrical window clusters and a central chimney.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, lantern, and symmetrical window arrangement beneath the mossy gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep roof pitch, chimney, and a wooden ladder leaning against the cabin, with visible log construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back gable, a single window, and the expanse of moss-covered roof with some loose planks nearby.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ladder, chimney, and additional windows, emphasizing the log structure and roof details.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with moss or turf covering, overhanging eaves, and a central chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows arranged symmetrically on the lower level, with a single window centered in the upper gable; windows are grouped in pairs or clusters with wooden frames
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade beneath the porch roof
